CreateFileSystem.fsName: Name of the FileSystem for easy identification. Length 1–65 bytes, must start with a letter, may contain letters, digits, and -_/. characters.
CreateFileSystem.zone: Availability zone where the FileSystem resides, e.g. zoneB.
CreateFileSystem.type: File system type: 1.cap (capacity) 2.ssd (performance). Default is capacity type.
CreateFileSystem.capacityQuota: Quota for the FileSystem. Omitting or setting to 0 means no hard limit; otherwise specifies the capacity upper limit (min 1GB, max 10PB when set), in bytes.
